items.title: STP - Compliance Reminder - Early Stage -Scott
items.desc: Reminds non-compliant teams about their Stay-to-Play requirement; the cadence and tone here are intentionally encouraging rather than punitive.

items.title: STP - Compliance Reminder - Escalation
items.desc: A firmer follow-up for teams still below their room-night commitment as the deadline nears.

items.title: STP - Welcome Email
items.desc: Introduces the team to their booking site and requirements.

items.title: STP - Previously Compliant Notice
items.desc: Notifies a team that was previously meeting its requirement but has since fallen out of compliance — it summarizes the current shortfall, the criteria that must be met, and the deadline before penalties apply.

items.title: STP - Deadline Approaching
items.desc: A time-sensitive reminder sent a few days before the hotel cutoff so teams can book remaining rooms.

items.title: STP - Compliance Achieved
items.desc: Congratulates a team once it meets its requirement.

items.title: Reservation Confirmation
items.desc: Contains reservation details, including dates, location, and confirmation number.

items.title: Hotel Confirmation
items.desc: Includes the reservation confirmation number and key booking details.

items.title: Pre - Arrival
items.desc: Provides important details to help guests prepare for their upcoming stay.

items.title: Reservation Cancellation
items.desc: Confirms that a reservation has been canceled, including relevant details.

items.title: Hotel User Account Creation
items.desc: Provides account access details for a new hotel user account.

items.title: RFP Invite
items.desc: Invites the hotel user to submit a proposal for an upcoming opportunity.

items.title: Contract Fully Executed
items.desc: Confirms the contract has been signed and is now finalized.
